about.body: Local pywebview app through the real Python PM3 bridge. No demo hardware states are generated.
about.title: RFID Workflow
antenna.body: Remove all transponders from the antenna.
antenna.error: Antenna check could not be completed.
antenna.title: Antenna check
help.antennaFails.body: Remove every transponder, keep the PM3 connected, then run the antenna check again. If it still fails, check the Proxmark3 client installation and USB connection.
help.antennaFails.title: Antenna check fails
help.notDetected.body: Reconnect the Proxmark3, verify the local PM3/ProxSpace installation, then run the startup check again. The app does not flash firmware.
help.notDetected.title: Proxmark3 is not detected
help.readFails.body: Place the transponder flat and centered, avoid stacking tags, then retry reading. Use position optimization if the signal remains unstable.
help.readFails.title: The transponder is not read
help.saveFails.body: A template can only be saved after two matching reads. Check that the second scan is verified and choose a non-empty name.
help.saveFails.title: A template cannot be saved
help.signalUnstable.body: Move the transponder in small steps, rotate it slightly, and keep metal objects away from the antenna.
help.signalUnstable.title: Signal is unstable
help.writeVerifyFails.body: Keep the target transponder in the same position until the re-read verification completes. Failed verification stops the workflow.
help.writeVerifyFails.title: A write could not be verified
language.label: Language
language.title: Choose your language
overview.step3: Save a template or create a backup
overview.title: Overview
settings.showStartup: Show startup check when the app starts
status.antennaIdle: No antenna check in this session.
